sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45677" key="e)fespereu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφεσπερ-εύω</orth>, <sense id="n45677.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">keep awake in the evening</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
